name: Pinion Candy
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Evaporated milk diluted with 1/2 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the nuts.
2. Cook to the soft ball stage.
3. Allow mixture to cool.
4. Add the pinon nuts and beat until smooth and creamy.
5. When the mixture begins to stiffen, drop spoonfuls onto a buttered sheet.
6. Press each dollop into patties.
7. The candy should firm up immediately.
